name: vn-goi-cuon
input: two gỏi cuốn fresh spring rolls with shrimp and pork, plus peanut sauce
notes: Vietnamese fresh spring roll (rice paper, shrimp, pork, vermicelli, herbs) + peanut sauce. USDA composite: ~95–110 kcal per roll + ~70 kcal sauce. Advisory tier — sauce portion varies widely between street vendors and home prep.
